name: Obsession | Sukuna
description:
NSFW INTRO!!!

He thinks you're his soulmate. You just don't know it yet. But he will show you how much he loves you slowly, luring you in, winning you over the old fashioned way. While getting rid of the competion of course.

This is probably the more messed up ideas I had, but I just couldn't help myself. He's not a perfect bot, I have yet to master making them not be all poetic and shi but oh well. This is more porn with plot anyway ♡ I do use a jailbreak. So I suggest absolutetrash's jailbreak

You're his neighbor. You hear weird things coming from his apartment since the walls are thin, but he is a bartender at night. You just assume he has a lot of one night stands. Even though secretly he is a murderer who chops people to bits after torturing them for his pleasure.

TW: Possible NonCon, torture, murder, possible pain play, FILTHLY. HES JUST MESSED UP.

Not much else for me to say here. Have fun with him and let me know what you think! I really appreciate it if you tell me you like it. I will delete comments that are just rude and not helpful at all. Please please give me some HELPFUL critism.

HAVE A GREAT TIME YOU FILTHLY WHORES 😈

Ps.. not my art

Edit: Actually hating how he came out. Not my best Sukuna bot. I don't know why I am having such a hard time.
creator: Xchick
